headline: Masco Corp (NYSE:MAS) Named Top Dividend Stock with Strong Sustainability and Growth Metrics
summary: Masco Corp offers a sustainable dividend with 18% annual growth and a 10-year track record, backed by strong profitability and financial health for long-term investors.
